feed.title: SAP Community - PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance
feed.subtitle: PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Purchase order item of order still without final billing indic. message
entry.content:
Hi Team,

When we try to business close the work order we are getting the below warning message:

Purchase order item of order still without final billing indic.

Message no. IW215

Can you please help us on this if we can check final invoice indicator in the PO and let us know the significance of doing so.

Regards,

Preethi

entry.title: Orders has not generated based on Call Date
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have Strategy based Maintenance Plan with cycles of 3M,6M,1Y the previous order got generated on 24/05/2024 for the next order the Planned date is on 22/11/2024 and Call date is on 24/08/2024 but the call did not get generated and status is in Scheduled hold. Why so?

Regards,

Preethi

entry.title: Fleet Management SAP PM - synchronisation with financial assets
entry.content:
Dear all,

I would like to automatically update fields between equipment master (Fleet managment) and financial asset master - especially license plate number.

Enhancements: AAPM0001 (transaction: SMOD), components: EXIT_SAPLAAPM_001 & EXIT_SAPLAAPM_002 were already used for updating other fields of equipment master (non-fleet mgmt.), that were not available in the standard list. 

Can this be also used for fields of fleet management? If not, what would be a valid alternative?

Thanks Sunnyi 🙂

entry.title: FM to create Measurement Document in Mass
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Please can you let me know the FM to create measurement document in mass. The input fields should be as follows: Measuring Point, Start date , End date, Read By and Counter Difference. The Counter difference should have atleast 3 characters.

Regards,

Preethi

entry.title: Alternative labeling for function location & replacing plant & company code
entry.content:
Hello,

I need help with a business requirement to change the company code and plant. We need to transfer all functional locations and equipment to new plants. All functional locations will have new labels with the same structure indicator.

My concerns:

  1. I plan to activate alternative labeling to change functional location labels. What impact will this have on all master data associated with the functional locations (equipment, maintenance plans, task lists, etc.) and on system operations and reporting?

  2. Is there a solution for mass changing new labels and company codes?

Thanks!

entry.title: Mass changes Equipment master in PM module
entry.content:
I need to make mass changes of Equipment master.
For example, to assign a different value of Cost centre to 1000 objects (Equipment master). How can I do it?
LSMW doesn't work and W is restricted in the context of data migrations to SAP S/4HANA (note 2287723)

Migration Cockpit is intended for initial data load - not for change. 
What should I do? Create ABAP-program for each case?

Thanks.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Create Order window to pick Order Type based on Notification field value
entry.content:
Hi,

SAP standard functionality for Work order creation from Notification (IW21/IW22) is that once we click on the create button adjacent to Order field, the "Create Order" window pops-up. Based on Order-Notification Integration in SPRO, the Work Order type is proposed automatically along with additional data like default Work center and Planner Group. 

Now as per our client requirement we have 02 Order Types (PMA1 & PMA2)  for a single Notification type (Z1). We have 02 priorities (F1 & F2). Our requirement is that if F1 is selected then PMA1 appears in Create Order window or PMA2 when F2 priority is selected. 

Will appreciate inputs on this requirement.

Regards

Faisal

entry.title: Changing settlement receiver
entry.content:
Hello,

we have this issue-work order was created with WBS element "A". After that WBS element was changed to WBS"B". Now when you open WO ->Settlement rule first time in column Settlement receiver is WBS"A", go out and back to settlement rule and in column settlement receiver is WBS"B".  

first attempt second attempt

entry.title: Contracts in Non-Stock Component
entry.content:
Hi Team,

How can we assign the contracts for a Non-Stock Component in Task List.

Regards,

Preethi.

entry.title: Unrestricted stock in storage locations for maintenance orders using fiori apps
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

We are implementing the corrective maintenance process (BH1) in S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition, and are aiming to manage everything through Fiori apps. During testing, we encountered an issue: when a maintenance order consumes a material that is out of stock in any storage location, the system allows the process to proceed without showing any error or message in the Fiori app (Create/Change Maintenance Order).

For example, when performing the same process in the SAP GUI transaction (IW31/IW32), the system displays the unrestricted-use stock as a field in the storage location search help, as shown below:

However, when we open the storage location search help in the Fiori app, the stock information is not available:

We would like to know if there is a similar functionality that allows us to view unrestricted-use stock in specific storage locations, similar to the SAP GUI, or if there is an option to activate a warning message. Alternatively, is it possible to extend the search help functionality in the Fiori app to add the stock fields using ABAP code ?

 

Thank you in advance for your help and best regards!

entry.title: Plant Maintenance Services Catalog OCI
entry.content:
Hi

At this point in time, has anyone have a working process for Service OCI  in PM work Orders?

Please let me know how you did this, what is the process, etc.

entry.title: Plant Maintenance module without HR(SAP HCM)
entry.content: Good morning, all, In PM module, will I be able to schedule, plan, and assign personnel to plant maintenance work orders, preventative maintenance, etc without HR module? Also known as SAP HCM module?

entry.title: IW38 ,Display number of entries (Counter) in PM list edit reports not showing to add in layout.
entry.content:
Hello Team,

User requested to see the number of entries for IW38 PM list edit report but for this the Counter is not showing in the layout to choose.

We required the functionality described in KBA  2181264 

Best Regards,

Ganesh

entry.title: Custom entity oMDO ID is not "in scope" in 2405 Asset Manager Component assignment
entry.content:
SAP Service and Asset Manager 
I have created a custom OMDO ID and custom entityset. At entityset level, I have activated it

But when I try to activate this OMDO ID in component assignment under OMDO assignment, its scope is deactivated so I am not able to activate it:

How can I activate it?

entry.title: COFC Period Posting issue for Work Order
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Under what circumstances a record will be confirmed through CAT9 and appear in COFC even when the period is locked for posting.

Regards,

Preethi.

entry.title: WCM Control Key
entry.content:
Hi All, 

Greetings !

I want to run a cycle of permit to work ( WCM ) on S4 Hana system . I am assigning WCM control key in work order operation but WAP is not getting activated . All WCM related business function is activated . Can anyone please shed some light what configuration is missing ? Is there any other method available to activate WCM ?

Thanking you very much

Best Regards 

Mohammed

entry.title: SAP EAM - Epic, Feature Example
entry.content: Can someone please give me an example of epic, feature, and user story from SAP context?  Like for example, if I have EAM, I am assuming "Preventative Maintenance", "Corrective Maintenace", "Management of Change" is considered as epic....  Please advise...  If there are other tracks, I can relate to, then please give me an example of that...

entry.title: Issue with : Perform Maintenance Jobs without assignment functionality
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

While exploring one of client requirement: As ' Supervisor can confirm the work without assigning WO/Operations to his name',

I can came across below node and did configuration accordingly. ( shown in fig 2)

 

 

Expectation from system behaviour is : System to allow [Perform Maintenance Jobs app] supervisor to confirm the Job/operations without assigning to his name or allow to confirm the Job even it is assigned to other technician(s)

Observation is, System is not behaving as mentioned above ? Am I missing something here ? 

Any comments or suggestion or alternative solution to client requirement ?

BR,

Riyaj

entry.title: SAP future strategy around Scope Items BH1, BH2 & BJ2 in Private Cloud Edition
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

9 Phase Model Vs Traditional Maintenance methods [ 4HH, 4HI Vs BH1, BH2 & BJ2]

I found, for SAP Best Practices for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Asset management scope Items BH1, BH2 & BJ2 scope items are excluded from default activation (that means they are Deprecated) Whereas in SAP Best Practices for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition all scope items are available (for activation).

Question here - if client is going with Private cloud edition, can they still use processes around scope items BH1, BH2 & BJ2 as they will remain activated and not deprecated in near future? (May be for next 3-4 years’ time span)

As I understand scope items BH1,BH2,BJ2 are deprecated from 2302 release in public cloud and replaced with 4HH and 4HI, But still in case client requirements to not to go ahead with 9 Phase model in private cloud edition, Is it still valid proposition to suggest these scope items?

I couldn’t find clear answer on this in SAP road map explorer or anywhere else hence reaching out to wider group of experts here.

Any comments or suggestions are highly appreciated in terms of guiding client(s) into right direction during process adaptation, Considering SAP future strategy around Scope Items BH1, BH2 & BJ2.

BR,

Riyaj

entry.title: Data conversion Plant Maintenance
entry.content:
Is there any recommended conversion strategy to move rom standard SAP PM to new S/4 Phase model. The main focus my question is on the transactional data conversion (Notification, Maintenance Orders). Not talking about creating new orders , but how to transfer orders that are released and being processed , already have Purchase Requisitions and Purchase orders assigned , Materias reserved and partially delivered, services requested and partially confirmed aso. 

Thanks for your feedback in advance.
